diagrams.title: Green IT Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shows all phases of IT asset lifecycle where Green IT considerations apply
diagrams.purpose: Understand that Green IT spans entire product lifecycle, not just usage phase

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how PUE is calculated in data centers
diagrams.purpose: Understand PUE = Total Facility Power / IT Equipment Power, where lower values indicate better efficiency

diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how multiple virtual machines run on a single physical server
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how virtualization consolidates workloads and reduces hardware footprint

diagrams.title: E-waste Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the preferred order of e-waste management methods
diagrams.purpose: Understand the waste management hierarchy - prevention is best, disposal is last resort

diagrams.title: Green IT Strategy Framework
diagrams.description: Overview of major strategies organizations can implement
diagrams.purpose: Comprehensive view of different approaches to Green IT implementation
